title: Mr. Coffee Simple Grind 14 Cup Coffee Grinder, Black
description:
About this item
EASY ON/OFF SWITCH: Blade grinder with an easy On/Off switch
STAINLESS STEEL BLADES: The powerful stainless steel blades quickly and easily grind whole coffee beans
14-CUP CAPACITY: Customize how much you grind; grinds enough coffee beans to make 4-14 cups of freshly brewed coffee
SAFETY SWITCH: The lid-activated safety switch allows grinding only when the lid is locked
TRANSPARENT LID: The transparent lid helps you keep an eye on the coffee beans as they are ground
CORD STORAGE: Cord storage allows for convenient storing
CLEANING BRUSH: Includes a cleaning brush—a clean machine means better tasting grounds
reviews_5s:
Grinds up coffee beans pretty quickly, it is kind of loud but to be expected. Super powerful and durable. I wish it was a little bit larger, but that's just a personal preference of mine.Did my 1st batch ever of grinded coffee beans. Easy to use and fast. My 1st grinder and I love it.I like to grind spices fresh for each recipe & this grinder is just the right size . Easy to clean .This is the absolute best working coffee grinder especially if grinding smaller amounts of beans. I had one and it lasted for years and I loved it, but I didn't take care of it well or clean it so I figured ok time for a new one. I decided to research non-sponsored articles for the best grinder in this category and came up with the Hamilton Beach. Got it - big mistake. The beans just whirled around barely hitting the blades and it came out a mess of sand and chunks. Returned it!!! Purchased another Mr Coffee and am never switching again.Nice size, easy to use, grinds coffee beans well.I bought this over 10 years ago and it finally died. The price is lower than it was 10 years ago!
It doesn't have a fine, medium or coarse button but that happens by how long you grind itl. The ground beans are easier to get out.I already have one. I bought this forca giftvexchange along with s bag of coffee beans. It was a popular gift and stolen back and forth several times.We had a Mr Coffee Electric Coffee that broke and we had just a great experience we purchased this brand again. Hope it holds up as long as our other one.Good for small batchesBought to use to grind up coffee as well as herbs meaning that we have to clean between uses. May have to get a separate one for the jalapeño pepper powder we have been making so it doesn’t mix with the other herbs like celery.

Speed is good. Recommend short burst vs holding the button constantly.
Sounds- it’s a grinder it’s going to be a bit loud
Design is fine for the size.
reviews_1s:
19.00

Arrives
Read directions
Pout 1/2 cup of beans in, affix lid, align white arrow to locking icon
Plug in
Press
NOTHING
Start return..and now it's 14.00. So a dual face slap. I need a giant, hand crank grinder, to stop having to deal with plastic devices that have months of use..and in this case, no use..

EDIT: The replacement arrived today. Filled the clear lid with beans (Use it as a safe measuring device so as not to over fill or overload) poured , plugged, turned on, and it worked. After 8 seconds it stopped. I stopped pressing, waited a moment, depressed the grind button and it started grinding, and again it stopped after seconds. I started to ASSUME this was how it functioned. So I waited 10 seconds ,pressed the button, it worked for 2 seconds, stopped, and would not work any more.

Last Mr. Coffee product I buy. Once is a fluke, twice is poor workmanship. My wife's magic Bullet smoothie grinder has been working fine for the last 3 months. I only decided to buy an actual grinder because she was worried I would warp the blades on her Bullet. I will go spend 30.00 on that as I knwo it's not a PIECE of poorly made junktried my 1st grind with this grinder according to the instruction & after 1st use, there are already strong burning smell coming out from the motor area. Concerned about the safety of this product & didn't try the 2nd time to due to the strong scene of burning smell.

in my opinion, not recommend this productBought this during the summer as a gift for someone. They just opened it and it does not work (even after troubleshooting it). Outside the return window so that sucks.This coffee grinder is terrible, it only worked once and now barely turns when I press the button. I dont know if i got a factory defect but I am returning this.I bought it late July 2024 and only used it 4 times grinding coffee. It already broke. Motor got hot and would not start. Couldn’t even finish grinding.I guess they got bought out a while back these things break constantly and their customer service is absolutely trash. Buy anything else.I ordered this grinder with high hopes, but the first one I got had a broken piece, when the replacement one came I cleaned it up for use but ,tried it a couple of times no problem, I didn't have a use for it until several weeks later and it made a little noise and was dead completely
.. so disappointed 😞 now I'm past the return date so I'm out the money..The item broke after using three times and not consecutively either. The button on the unit no longer works. I still have not heard from the company that bought out Mr. Coffee.I got to use it once, and the next morning I prepped my coffee pot and I filled my beans inside the compartment and pressed the button and nothing. At first I thought it was the outlet and I checked the breakers and to my disappointment it was the grinder. I had to run 8 miles into town and get an off brand grinder in order to make my coffee. I think I just got a defective unit.Sorry but the motor burned after a few grindings
